hero.subtitle: A STREET FOR ALL TASTES. A SQUARE FOR ALL SENSES.

about.label: About the area
about.p1: Nytorgsstråket is a carefully curated shopping and cultural street in Södermalm — an area where international brands meet local artisans, and where every venue has been selected with a meticulous eye for quality and character.
about.p2: Here you will find everything from well-curated fashion boutiques and specialty coffee to award-winning restaurants, crafts, and culture — all gathered on a compact, pedestrian-friendly street right in the heart of SoFo.

newsletter.label: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Get the latest news regarding opening hours, events, and updates from Nytorgsstråket directly in your inbox.
newsletter.success: Thank you! You are now subscribed to the newsletter.
newsletter.privacy: No spam — unsubscribe at any time.

footer.description: Södermalm's most vibrant street where tradition meets contemporary culture.
